rulings.Case Title: MARGARET PATRICK, et al VS. METROPOLITAN LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 23, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Chicago Bridge & Iron Company¿s motion for summary judgment and alternate motion for summary adjudication: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:45am. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 23, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion for order granting leave to file first amended complaint is off calendar pursuant to the order granting plaintiffs¿ motion filed April 17, 2013. = (503/TLJ)
